name: PT Intermedia Capital Tbk
summary: PT Intermedia Capital Tbk, through its subsidiaries, provides television broadcasting services in Indonesia. It operates ANTV, a free-to-air television channel. The company offers content that are focused on families, children, and entertainment. It is also involved in the provision of communication and management consultancy services; and production house activities. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Intermedia Capital Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Visi Media Asia Tbk.
